title: Paws Off, Cheddarface!
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo's sneaky rival hires a look-alike to steal his newspaper and his good name, but with his family's help he gets everything back! 🧀

options.en: A radio host named Simon Squealer
options.zh: 名叫西蒙·叽喳的电台主持人

options.en: A best-selling author who runs The Rodent's Gazette
options.zh: 一位畅销书作家，经营《啮齿动物公报》报社

options.en: A professional dancer at the Pawprint Theater according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 爪印剧院的职业舞蹈演员（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The owner of a chocolate shop

explain.en: Geronimo tells the reader he is a best-selling author and publisher of the newspaper called The Rodent's Gazette.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在书中自我介绍为畅销书作家，也是《啮齿动物公报》的出版人。

q.en: What is the name of the mouse pretending to be Geronimo?
q.zh: 假冒杰罗尼摩的那只老鼠叫什么名字？

options.zh: 西德尼·斯塔弗，一名职业演员

options.en: Sally Ratmousen, a newspaper rival according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 莎莉·拉特莫森，报社对手（按书中另一种说法）
本杰明，杰罗尼摩的侄子

explain.en: After the show, Geronimo and Thea find the impostor's dropped wallet with a business card reading 'Sydney Starfur, professional actor.'
explain.zh: 演出结束后，杰罗尼摩和蒂奥娜捡到冒名者掉落的钱包，里面的名片写着'西德尼·斯塔弗，职业演员'。

q.en: Who hired the fake Geronimo to trick everyone?
q.zh: 是谁雇来假杰罗尼摩去欺骗大家的？

options.en: The radio host Simon Squealer according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 电台主持人西蒙·叽喳（按书中另一种说法）
莎莉·拉特莫森，他的报社对手

explain.en: Letters in the wallet show Sally Ratmousen hired Sydney Starfur to pretend to be Geronimo and steal his newspaper.
explain.zh: 钱包里的信件显示，莎莉·拉特莫森雇了西德尼·斯塔弗冒充杰罗尼摩，目的是抢走他的报社。

q.en: Where did the fake Geronimo put on his show?
q.zh: 假杰罗尼摩在哪里登台演出？

options.en: At the Sleazy Fur Dance Factory

explain.en: The poster reads 'Geronimo Stilton Live Onstage! at the Pawprint Theater 7:30 p.m.'
explain.zh: 海报上写着'杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿现场登台！晚上七点半，爪印剧院'。

q.en: How old is Geronimo's favorite nephew Benjamin?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩最喜爱的侄子本杰明几岁？

explain.en: The book says Benjamin is only nine years old when Geronimo tries to call him at school.
explain.zh: 书中写到，杰罗尼摩试图打电话到学校找本杰明时，提到他只有九岁。

q.en: What did Aunt Stitchy give Geronimo on his fifth birthday?
q.zh: 斯蒂奇阿姨在杰罗尼摩五岁生日时送了他什么？

options.en: A hideous yellow hat with cat-like ears
options.zh: 一顶长着猫耳朵的难看黄帽子

options.en: A solid-gold cheese holder according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一个纯金奶酪架（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Thea tests Geronimo by asking this; he answers that Aunt Stitchy knit him a hideous yellow hat with cat ears.
explain.zh: 蒂奥娜用这个问题考验杰罗尼摩，他答出斯蒂奇阿姨曾织了一顶长猫耳朵的难看黄帽子。

q.en: What was the fake Geronimo driving when Geronimo caught up to him?
q.zh: 当杰罗尼摩追上假杰罗尼摩时，他正开着什么？

options.en: A motorcycle on Blue Cheese Avenue
options.zh: 蓝纹奶酪大道上的摩托车
一家甜点店的送货卡车

options.en: A taxi to the Pawprint Theater
options.zh: 前往爪印剧院的出租车

explain.en: Geronimo hides by his hole and sees the fake arrive in a yellow car — the book says 'That rotten mouse was driving MY car!'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩躲在自家门口，看到冒名者开着一辆黄色汽车出现——书中写道'那只坏老鼠开着我的车！'

q.en: What is the name of the psychiatrist Geronimo visits?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩去看的精神科医生叫什么名字？

options.zh: 爱德华·斯·傲慢鼠三世医生

options.en: Dr. Feelgood from the Press Club
options.zh: 来自新闻俱乐部的感觉好医生

explain.en: Thea makes an appointment with Dr. Furry Feelgood, whose wall sign reads 'DON'T WORRY, KEEP SQUEAKING!'
explain.zh: 蒂奥娜为杰罗尼摩预约了毛茸茸·感觉好医生，他墙上的标语写着'别担心，继续吱吱叫！'

q.en: Who dresses up to look like Sally Ratmousen to get the paper back?
q.zh: 为了夺回报社，谁扮成了莎莉·拉特莫森的样子？

options.zh: 西德尼·斯塔弗，那名演员
本杰明，杰罗尼摩的侄子
蒂奥娜，杰罗尼摩的妹妹

explain.en: Benjamin's plan leads the family to disguise Trap as Sally using a makeover at the Fur 4 Life salon.
explain.zh: 本杰明想出主意，家人在毛皮永生美容院把赖皮化妆成莎莉的样子。

q.en: What product was Geronimo's picture used to advertise in the magazine?
q.zh: 杂志里用杰罗尼摩的照片为哪种产品做了广告？

options.en: A toilet called the Flusher Rat
Cheddar-scented bath salts according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 切达奶酪香味的浴盐（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo sees his picture beside an ad for the Flusher Rat toilet, with the quote 'You'll feel like a king on a throne.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在杂志上看到自己的照片出现在一则'冲水鼠'马桶广告旁，广告语是'你会觉得自己像坐在王座上的国王'。
